title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines six essential skills for maximizing Claude project output: web scraping, knowledge base ingestion, system improvement iteration, advisory board querying, user testing, and compound engineering. The framework is demonstrated through building a fitness trainer application and is positioned as a repeatable workflow for any Claude project.
